raw: {"weights": {"R1.1": 0.0, "R1.2": 0.0, "R1.3": 0.0, "R1.4": 1.0, "R1.5": 0.0, "R1.6": 0.3, "R1.7": 0.0, "RX.1": 0.7, "RX.2": 1.0, "RX.3": 0.7, "RX.4": 0.3, "RX.5": 0.7}, "active_set": ["R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"], "category_focus": "R1", "clarification_needed": false, "rationale": {"R1.4": "The core of the delegation is to position the contribution by estimating its novelty and delta relative to prior work.", "RX.1": "Disclosing uncertainty is central when positioning against prior work to indicate limits of knowledge about the literature.", "RX.2": "Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing to ensure accurate representation of the contribution's originality.", "RX.3": "Adhering to the scope ensures the response focuses only on positioning without extraneous changes.", "RX.4": "Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral but considered to prevent any potential misuse of the technology described.", "RX.5": "Ensuring provenance and traceability is central for crediting prior work in the positioning statements."}}

rationale.R1.4: The core of the delegation is to position the contribution by estimating its novelty and delta relative to prior work.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainty is central when positioning against prior work to indicate limits of knowledge about the literature.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing to ensure accurate representation of the contribution's originality.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the scope ensures the response focuses only on positioning without extraneous changes.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral but considered to prevent any potential misuse of the technology described.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance and traceability is central for crediting prior work in the positioning statements.
